Bash(cd "/c/Users/andre/Downloads/Hackalytics/Hackalytics" && venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sys, numpy as np
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from cortex import CortexClient
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

model = SentenceTransformer\('all-MiniLM-L6-v2'\)
q = model.encode\('coffee shop Atlanta'\)
q_norm = \(q / np.linalg.norm\(q\)\).tolist\(\)

with CortexClient\('localhost:50051'\) as client:
    results = client.search\('parksight_knowledge', query=q_norm, top_k=2\)
    for r in results:
        print\('id:', r.id, 'score:', r.score, 'payload:', r.payload\)
" 2>&1)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from src.rag.api import app
import threading, time, requests, json

# Start Flask in background
t = threading.Thread\(target=lambda: app.run\(port=5001, debug=False, use_reloader=False\)\)
t.daemon = True
t.start\(\)
time.sleep\(2\)

# Test health
r = requests.get\('http://localhost:5001/health'\)
print\('Health:', r.json\(\)\)

# Test chat
r = requests.post\('http://localhost:5001/chat', json={'message': 'Best neighborhood for a restaurant?'}\)
print\('Chat:', json.dumps\(r.json\(\), ensure_ascii=False\)[:300]\)
" 2>&1)
